response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio in Scene 1 did not contain the vocal song from the reference JSON, only its instrumental version, so the reference lyrics were not utilized. The remaining spoken dialogue is in English and was transcribed manually. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were discarded since no vocals were present in Scene 1. Spoken dialogue in Scene 2 and 3 was fully transcribed manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual text and bleeped/fast-paced English spoken dialogue exactly to their on-screen/vocal durations, utilizing aggressive truncation and seamless transitions where dialogue was continuous to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: [お気に召すまま]
subtitles.english: [Title: Oki ni Mesu Mama]

subtitles.original: Wow!
subtitles.english: Wow!

subtitles.original: Oh my God! Did you see us? We're so cute!
subtitles.english: Oh my God! Did you see us? We're so cute!

subtitles.original: All four of us are so cute together!
subtitles.english: All four of us are so cute together!

subtitles.original: I loved that concert! Yay!
subtitles.english: I loved that concert! Yay!

subtitles.original: This is where the money's at! Yeah, the money is in the concert!
subtitles.english: This is where the money's at! Yeah, the money is in the concert!

subtitles.original: It was so nice to see everyone perform.
subtitles.english: It was so nice to see everyone perform.

subtitles.original: More concerts! More music! If only there was a concert that was coming up...
subtitles.english: More concerts! More music! If only there was a concert that was coming up...

subtitles.original: Ah, if only... If only there were tickets available right now for a concert!
subtitles.english: Ah, if only... If only there were tickets available right now for a concert!

subtitles.original: Serendipity... I wonder where that word came from.
subtitles.english: Serendipity... I wonder where that word came from.

subtitles.original: Wait! What if we invite even more people?
subtitles.english: Wait! What if we invite even more people?

subtitles.original: But if we invite more people, it won't be a concert anymore, because when there's more people, they start fighting.
subtitles.english: But if we invite more people, it won't be a concert anymore, because when there's more people, they start fighting.

subtitles.original: No... You mean drama?
subtitles.english: No... You mean drama?

subtitles.original: Drama! Drama! Yeah, when you get too many girls in a room, drama happens.
subtitles.english: Drama! Drama! Yeah, when you get too many girls in a room, drama happens.

subtitles.original: But that does sell. We love seeing girls fight.
subtitles.english: But that does sell. We love seeing girls fight.

subtitles.original: Sometimes there's just too many girls, you know? And yeah, and sometimes they just can't get along.
subtitles.english: Sometimes there's just too many girls, you know? And yeah, and sometimes they just can't get along.

subtitles.original: Mm-hmm... But that makes for good television.
subtitles.english: Mm-hmm... But that makes for good television.

subtitles.original: We should film them.
subtitles.english: We should film them.

subtitles.original: Let's content-farm them.
subtitles.english: Let's content-farm them.

subtitles.original: [FOLLOWING UP ON THE HOLOLIVE-ENIANS]
subtitles.english: [Title: FOLLOWING UP ON THE HOLOLIVE-ENIANS]

subtitles.original: [LOS ANGELES]
subtitles.english: [Location: LOS ANGELES]

subtitles.original: [GINA'S CONDO]
subtitles.english: [Location: GINA'S CONDO]

subtitles.original: Oh my God, girls, if you want to hang out with us, you have to step up your bag game. Like, where did you even get your bag from? It looks... budget.
subtitles.english: Oh my God, girls, if you want to hang out with us, you have to step up your bag game. Like, where did you even get your bag from? It looks... budget.

subtitles.original: You don't even recognize the bag I carried today?
subtitles.english: You don't even recognize the bag I carried today?

subtitles.original: Oh, you... Next time we're going to have to take you to Benella. Benella.
subtitles.english: Oh, you... Next time we're going to have to take you to Benella. Benella.

subtitles.original: Benella? / Yeah.
subtitles.english: Benella? / Yeah.

subtitles.original: I own that company. / Oh! You own Benella?
subtitles.english: I own that company. / Oh! You own Benella?

subtitles.original: I own the sister branch of Benella. / Oh my God.
subtitles.english: I own the sister branch of Benella. / Oh my God.

subtitles.original: Oh my God, what are you cooking?
subtitles.english: Oh my God, what are you cooking?

subtitles.original: Oh, it's my newest recipe. It's a zero-calorie...
subtitles.english: Oh, it's my newest recipe. It's a zero-calorie...

subtitles.original: Oh shit.
subtitles.english: Oh shit.

subtitles.original: It's a zero-calorie...
subtitles.english: It's a zero-calorie...

subtitles.original: Oh my God! Oh shit.
subtitles.english: Oh my God! Oh shit.

subtitles.original: Oh my God, what the—
subtitles.english: Oh my God, what the—

subtitles.original: What happened?
subtitles.english: What happened?

subtitles.original: Are you going to pick that up?
subtitles.english: Are you going to pick that up?

subtitles.original: Don't tell me what to do!
subtitles.english: Don't tell me what to do!

subtitles.original: You literally threw it on the ground.
subtitles.english: You literally threw it on the ground.

subtitles.original: No, I didn't!
subtitles.english: No, I didn't!

subtitles.original: You literally did it. You can't accidentally throw something on the ground.
subtitles.english: You literally did it. You can't accidentally throw something on the ground.

subtitles.original: No, I didn't. You put it there! / I put it there?
subtitles.english: No, I didn't. You put it there! / I put it there?

subtitles.original: You put your ass in my stupid kitchen, you—! You absolute—!
subtitles.english: You put your ass in my stupid kitchen, you—! You absolute—!

subtitles.original: I did not do that!
subtitles.english: I did not do that!

subtitles.original: You literally did! You always make shit up! I watched you do that.
subtitles.english: You literally did! You always make shit up! I watched you do that.

subtitles.original: Did you see her do that? Did you see her do that?
subtitles.english: Did you see her do that? Did you see her do that?

subtitles.original: Did you see that? Did she seriously... Oh, yeah, we saw that, sis.
subtitles.english: Did you see that? Did she seriously... Oh, yeah, we saw that, sis.

subtitles.original: I saw you throw a frying pan, girl. / No, no! / Excuse me?
subtitles.english: I saw you throw a frying pan, girl. / No, no! / Excuse me?

subtitles.original: Yeah, so I was making this totally delicious zero-calorie option dinner for everyone...
subtitles.english: Yeah, so I was making this totally delicious zero-calorie option dinner for everyone...

subtitles.original: ...because I know that everyone needs to lose a little weight for the party tomorrow. And I just can't believe that she would do such a thing.
subtitles.english: ...because I know that everyone needs to lose a little weight for the party tomorrow. And I just can't believe that she would do such a thing.

subtitles.original: Have you seen Celine? She's a total fucking—. That food is going to be nasty, and you know it.
subtitles.english: Have you seen Celine? She's a total fucking—. That food is going to be nasty, and you know it.

subtitles.original: She's always on these like health trips, but it doesn't do anything for her figure. Come here!
subtitles.english: She's always on these like health trips, but it doesn't do anything for her figure. Come here!

subtitles.original: Don't tell me what to do! / Come here! Come here! You're not my mom! Look! Look at it!
subtitles.english: Don't tell me what to do! / Come here! Come here! You're not my mom! Look! Look at it!

subtitles.original: You threw that on the ground. / I've never seen that in my entire life. / How have you never seen that in your entire life?
subtitles.english: You threw that on the ground. / I've never seen that in my entire life. / How have you never seen that in your entire life?

subtitles.original: I've never seen that in my entire life. / You got this for me, for Christmas!
subtitles.english: I've never seen that in my entire life. / You got this for me, for Christmas!

subtitles.original: I would never get you something for Christmas. / What?
subtitles.english: I would never get you something for Christmas. / What?

subtitles.original: You got it for me for Christmas! You always do this.
subtitles.english: You got it for me for Christmas! You always do this.

subtitles.original: Someone hold me back, hold me back, hold me back! / Hey hey hey hey, leave her!
subtitles.english: Someone hold me back, hold me back, hold me back! / Hey hey hey hey, leave her!

subtitles.original: Leave my friend alone! It's okay, it's okay, don't cry.
subtitles.english: Leave my friend alone! It's okay, it's okay, don't cry.

subtitles.original: You're going to ruin your mascara, girl. You guys are so dramatic.
subtitles.english: You're going to ruin your mascara, girl. You guys are so dramatic.

subtitles.original: So dramatic! How dare you! She's crazy!
subtitles.english: So dramatic! How dare you! She's crazy!

subtitles.original: She is fucking crazy! She is crazy!
subtitles.english: She is fucking crazy! She is crazy!

subtitles.original: Shut the fuck up! Who even are you? I don't even know why the fuck I'm here!
subtitles.english: Shut the fuck up! Who even are you? I don't even know why the fuck I'm here!

subtitles.original: I was just here to like promote my music and like, all these, you know, really rich girls here. I'm so honored to be here honestly...
subtitles.english: I was just here to like promote my music and like, all these, you know, really rich girls here. I'm so honored to be here honestly...

subtitles.original: ...but I don't know what the fuck went on. Like, what the fuck? I think it's the water.
subtitles.english: ...but I don't know what the fuck went on. Like, what the fuck? I think it's the water.

subtitles.original: There's something in the water. I don't even know why Irene was here.
subtitles.english: There's something in the water. I don't even know why Irene was here.
